headline: Is Emerson Electric (EMR) Still Attractive After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Emerson Electric is still reasonably priced after its strong run, this article walks through what the current share price could imply about value. The stock last closed at US$144.56, with returns of 7.4% over 7 days, 9.3% over 30 days, 6.4% year to date, 46.3% over 1 year, 75.4% over 3 years and 76.2% over 5 years, so recent performance is an important part of the valuation story. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing portfolio reshaping, acquisitions and...
